# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New diagnostic / plugin
- [ ] New feature or option
- [ ] Docs / tests / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for this change)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Diagnostic mode still never mutates the machine
- [ ] No secrets or environment values are printed
- [ ] Report text (if any) is routed through the `Sanitizer`
